Video.summary: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he’s selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home. A safe full of evidence is found during a traffic stop.
Video.title: Safe Cracking

Video.summary: A suspect calls the police and states that he wants to kill himself and any officer who tries to help him. None of the three occupants of a stopped car will admit to ownership of a bag of drugs. A man begs not to be arrested so that he can pay child support.
Video.title: My Bills Won't Wait

Video.summary: Officers chase a fleeing suspect as he runs through the woods and into a rose bush. An elderly man puts himself in the middle of a knife fight. Two brothers disagree over letting officers search their car.
Video.title: And Through the Woods

Video.summary: A suspect selling narcotics takes off on foot. A bank robber leaves his wallet in an abandoned money bag. Multiple domestic violence calls end in arrests
Video.title: Dyed in the Wool

Video.summary: Deputies respond to a call of a man shooting a gun in his front yard. Officers are called to a domestic dispute over a wrinkly infant’s shirt. Four armed and suspicious men are spotted by deputies.
Video.title: Yard Work

Video.summary: A carjacking results in a chase and a flipped vehicle. Suspects crash a truck after attempting to steal beer. A man attempts to swallow his drugs during a bust.
Video.title: Beer Run

Video.summary: Officers pursue an SUV on the freeway. Deputies are called after an agitated man arms himself with scissors. A driver tells officers the illegal items found in his car was left by a friend.
Video.title: Decorating Tips

Video.summary: Police officers set up a sting operation using a taxi cab in to bust prostitution. A man claims he can’t remember his ‘girlfriend’s’ name when officers suspect the woman is actually a stranger. Female undercover officers set up a sting operation to bust johns.
Video.title: Amnesia Can Happen

Video.summary: Officers respond to a call of a woman holding a loaded gun to her head. Officers kick in a door to halt an assault in progress. A woman driving a stolen vehicle claims it was purchased by a friend.
Video.title: My BFF Screwed Up

Video.summary: A combative man at a fast food restaurant claims his phone was stolen. Multiple illegal items are found on a man parked on the side of the road. An intoxicated man throws an 83-year-old’s walker.
Video.title: No Respect these Days

Video.summary: An Officer goes undercover as a prostitute. A woman finds a snake in her home. A man solicits himself to an undercover officer.
Video.title: You Had Me Fooled

Video.summary: A suspect has a change of heart after he leads police on a pursuit. An Officer discovers sterile syringes and rocks in a suspicious man’s pocket after he is stopped and searched. A woman is arrested for stealing C.D's out of a car.
Video.title: Rocks Are Cool

Video.summary: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot-chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for back-up after a woman is held at knife-point.
Video.title: Hard Ticket

Video.summary: Men seeking the services of a prostitute are arrested during a sting operation. New Jersey Police investigate a potential organized attack on a female suspect. Locals detain a man after he’s caught burglarizing property in the area.
Video.title: John Be Gone

Video.summary: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in foot chase and subsequent arrest. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence’s girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man’s house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.
Video.title: Fast Pase Foot Chase

Video.summary: A man runs from Police over a parole violation. Officers respond when a trouble maker is expelled from a bar for bad behavior. Police pursue a man after he bails from his car during a traffic stop.
Video.title: Bad Behavior

Video.summary: Officers spot a suspected stolen vehicle and a pursuit ensues. Officers are called to a fight at a bar over a tossed drink. Police are called to the scene of two intoxicated siblings arguing.
Video.title: That’s Not Nice

Video.summary: A man involved in a drug deal claims he works for the task force. An irate woman slams the front door when Officers arrive. Police pull over two young suspects in an area known for drug activity.
Video.title: I’m With You Guys

Video.summary: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.
Video.title: Dare I Ask?

Video.summary: An officer shows up as Coco the Clown in an undercover sting. The Vice unit conducts a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspected “johns.”
Video.title: Coco the Clown

Video.summary: Detectives find a loaded gun while searching a vehicle. Local residents complain about a loud neighbor. A man is spotted walking down a road with a saw.
Video.title: Chainsaw Man

Video.summary: At the conclusion of an extensive pursuit, the driver eventually loses control and runs into a stop sign. Officers stop a stolen vehicle leaving a known drug house.
Video.title: Bottom Fishing

Video.summary: The victim of a home invasion was held at gunpoint. A man in a wheelchair is in a stand-off with campus police. Officers respond to a call about a knife-wielding assailant.
Video.title: College Nightmare

Video.summary: Officers respond after two men kick in a woman's door. Three suspects attempt to steal a bicycle in an alley. An officer arrests a husband for domestic abuse.
Video.title: Copy of Breaking Home Barriers

Video.summary: Three men are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at an apartment complex. An officer discovers a teenager is dating an older man.
Video.title: Strange Pairing

Video.summary: Officers stop a man riding a bicycle in the middle of the street with no backlight. Suspects have a fun night out in a neighborhood known for drugs. Officers are dispatched to help a woman when her boyfriend threatens her with a brick.
Video.title: Midnight Ride

Video.summary: Deputies are forced to tase a man after pursuing him into a field. A driver plays dumb when asked about the revolver under his car seat. Officers respond to two teenage girls in a fight.
Video.title: Mean Girls Times Two

Video.summary: Police conduct a sting operation. A woman is covered in white powder during a traffic stop. Officers spot a young boy on a bike who wandered away from home.
Video.title: Maybe it's Sugar

Video.summary: Officers deploy a police K-9 when a burglary suspect takes refuge in a lemon tree. A suspect on the run seeks shelter in a stranger’s house. A biker with a suspended license just doesn’t know how to listen.
Video.title: Who Let the Dogs Out

Video.summary: A car thief leads police on a high-speed chase until officers pit his vehicle to end the pursuit. Cops cool off a baby and search for the man who left him in a car. Potty-mouthed witnesses inform officers that their friend has been stabbed in the chest.
Video.title: This Man Stabbed Me

Video.summary: A husky cyclist takes a spill when he tries to flee. Officers chase a suspect in a stolen car who says he was just fixing it for a friend. A man's denials of drug use lose credibility when cops find a meth pipe in his vehicle
Video.title: You Didn't Get Very Far

Video.summary: After a tow service employee denies a woman her car back, she uses his body for batting practice. A man with a warrant explains his medicinal meth use. No lie is too big for a couple trying to convince officers they didn’t shoplift.
Video.title: Batter Up

Video.summary: A feisty cyclist gives a team of officers a bloody fight. A scared caregiver attempts to evict an unwanted helper from her patient’s house. Mysterious tinfoil lands an unlicensed driver in hot water.
Video.title: Mohawked Cleaning Service

Video.summary: Three men try to convince cops they had no idea their vehicle was stolen. Officers respond after a partygoer mistakes another guest’s finger for dessert. A domestic abuse suspect makes police run through the streets.
Video.title: Lady Bit My Finger

Video.summary: A suspect uses bizarre driving techniques to elude cops. A tough officer wades through a forest of denial before finding the crack. Police search for man accused of shooting up the neighborhood.
Video.title: Pass the Rock

Video.summary: A jaywalker darts on a mad dash through the weeds. Things go badly for a suspect on a stolen motorcycle when choppers help officers track him down. A domestic dispute leads cops to a slew of unexpected crimes.
Video.title: Eye in the Sky

Video.summary: Hitching a ride home with the wrong guy almost lands one woman in the slammer. A known prostitute won’t be going on a second date. When a domestic partner refuses to leave home, officers intervene.
Video.title: Drunk in Love

Video.summary: A driver bails out of his vehicle after an attempted traffic stop, the suspect is ultimately tased and arrested. An officer assists with a fight call on the Las Vegas Strip. A Florida man is arrested after an unlikely story is deemed inaccurate.
Video.title: Hanky Panky

Video.summary: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.
Video.title: A Mother's Love

Video.summary: A woman bites the arresting officer and store manager after trying to steal beer. A passenger of a suspicious vehicle attempts to hide drugs. Police respond to a call involving a knife and two women.
Video.title: Fangs Come Out

Video.summary: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer-involved fight. A brazen driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving.
Video.title: Drive Thru Blues

Video.summary: A man is taken to jail in connection to reports of solicitation. Officers investigate a stolen Escalade. An officer reunites a mother and her 5-year-old son.
Video.title: He's a Darter

Video.summary: Officers question a couple looking to score. Officers respond to a domestic violence call in which it is unclear what exactly transpired. Officers assist on a shots fired call.
Video.title: Kiss & Make Up

Video.summary: An officer assists with a burglary call at a mall jeweler. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call involving two newlyweds at a Las Vegas motel. An accident occurs during a routine traffic stop.
Video.title: A Man's Pride

Video.summary: Officers find drugs after pursuing a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car. Officers intervene in a domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.
Video.title: School Zone Chase

Video.summary: Officers assist a bondsman after a fugitive and his girlfriend refuse to surrender. An officer pulls over a teen who attempts to ingest a bag of marijuana while the officer isn’t looking. An officer makes an arrest after the female suspect has an outstanding warrant.
Video.title: Sledgehammer

Video.summary: An assailant attacks a woman after bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on a cameraman’s equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.
Video.title: Running Amok

Video.summary: Officer ends up in a foot pursuit after pulling over a suspicious vehicle with expired tags. A recovering addict is caught with drug paraphernalia in her backpack. A man is served an arrest warrant for sexual battery.
Video.title: Liar, Liar

Video.summary: Police investigate an attempted robbery that turned deadly. Officers enlist a K9 unit to flush out a suspect. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.
Video.title: The Last Home Invasion

Video.summary: The boat unit contends with an unruly suspect and his equally unpredictable dogs. Two burglary suspects try to claim car trouble when they're found at the scene of the crime. A repentant meth addict is caught by officers on the brink of his latest relapse.
Video.title: Doggie Paddle

Video.summary: One suspect takes his chances in a ravine after he leads deputies to a dead end. A vehicle search turns a family outing into a trip to jail. The cops inspect a disturbance between a dad and his son.
Video.title: Dead End Dash

Video.summary: A couple attempts to give the cops the slip during a storm. A motorist tries to resist deputies, but his moves are outdated. Police encounter a suspiciously sweaty man on an eerily dim street.
Video.title: Dishonest Dudes

Video.summary: An armed trespasser uses a young dog as a shield. A woman under the influence goes on a rampage, tearing into homes and people. A cat lady calls the cops when her neighbors get nosy.
Video.title: Cats and Dogs

Video.summary: ATV joyriders lead officers on an unwieldy chase. An attempt to check on some expired tags ends with a couple at gunpoint. A motorist gives deputies his brother’s name in hopes of avoiding jail time.
Video.title: Highway to Jail

Video.summary: Officers come to the rescue when a troubled man hits a low point. The cops are called when a man starts a food fight. Deputies catch a man off-guard during their search of a parking garage.
Video.title: Window of Opportunity

Video.summary: A father and son get caught up in a traffic stop gone awry. When a family fight escalates, body parts go flying. A disoriented driver can’t believe his luck when deputies follow him to a gas station.
Video.title: Mixed Emotions

Video.summary: A desperate suspect risks his life in an attempt to escape arrest. A father refuses to lie for his violent son. A malnourished woman makes a call to report some trespassing ghosts.
Video.title: First Time Caller
